'''Foag''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] in the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]] serving on the [[Agave-class picket ship]] ''[[Folna]]'' during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] under [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]]
